briefs.title: BC Ferries route designations updated under Coastal Ferry Act — schedule amended
briefs.summary: BC updated the official list of designated ferry routes (the routes legally required to operate under the Coastal Ferry Act) by replacing certain pages in the Designation Regulation. The updated schedule took effect February 9, 2026, and can be viewed at BC Ferries' head office in Victoria or on the BC Ferries website under Governance.
briefs.action_required: Check the updated route designation schedule at bcferries.com if your business depends on specific BC Ferries routes.
